info.title: dotnet-codeartifact-creds
info.description: A tool to configure NuGet credential provider for AWS CodeArtifact sources.

commands.name: install
commands.description: Installs the AWS CodeArtifact NuGet credential provider into the NuGet plugins folder

options.name: profile
options.description: Sets the AWS profile to use with the AWS CodeArtifact Credential Provider.
